upasargachandrika.example_text: 'prakzAlanAdDi paNkasya dUrAdasparSanaM varam' (hita॰1.185) uBayatra praSabdena nArTaH
'aBiprakzAlito yaM maRiH' (vikrama0 5) samyak SoDita ityarTaH aBiprayorekataraH SakyaH parihartum
